_comment: Pre-biopsy diagnostic profile: elevated PSA 12.4 ng/mL with mp-MRI PI-RADS 4 lesion, no histology yet. Engine should match WORKUP-SUSPECTED-PROSTATE and emit a Diagnostic Brief, NOT a Treatment Plan (CHARTER §15.2 C7).

suspicion.presentation: 63M with elevated_psa 12.4 ng/mL detected on routine screening; rising_psa from 4.1 ng/mL three years prior (doubling time ~2.4 y). DRE reveals abnormal_dre with right-base prostate_nodule. No 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor use. No recent prostatitis or instrumentation. Pre-biopsy multiparametric prostate MRI shows PI-RADS 4 lesion in right peripheral zone (1.2 cm) with restricted diffusion. Mild luts_with_psa (IPSS 9). No urinary_obstruction requiring catheterisation. No hematospermia. PSA density 0.21.
